measurement_note: Size is q, the number of method calls. The 32/128/512 tiers span 16x. Each sequence first builds a history of q/2 visits, then repeatedly moves back one page and visits a replacement, keeping a long retained prefix. The indexed valid-end design processes all calls in O(q) time. A correct implementation that explicitly copies the retained prefix on every branch-changing visit takes O(q^2), completes normally at q = 512, and is rejected by scaling.
